author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: layernorm_f32/f64, layernorm_backward_f32/f64, rmsnorm_f32/f64, rmsnorm_backward_f32/f64. Pattern: threadgroup reduction for mean/variance per row, then normalize. Similar to softmax_f32 kernel structure already implemented in C.7.
